notes: Beta build 2026.07.16-302 — the day-trader batch! NEW in 📋 My trading rules: 🪤 trailing stop (ratchets below the highest close — never down), 🛡 break-even move (+X% → stop to entry), ⏱ time stop (exit stale positions after N days at the next open). Auto-pilot's scanner gains don't-chase gates: 🟢 green-day-only, skip RSI ≥ 70, skip big day-jumps. And a 📊 SCOREBOARD button judges the bot on its own closed trades — win rate, expectancy, profit factor, drawdown. PLEASE TEST: set a trail % (say 8) and watch a winner's 🛑 ratchet up in the portfolio (each step is logged); try a time stop of 10 days; and after a few bot trades, open the Scoreboard and tell me if the numbers match your own arithmetic. Trail/time exits re-arm 🔁 repeats (only a true stop pauses them). All practice money. Feedback via ✉ top-left!
